items.name_en: 💕【New Arrival】GG Emblem Series Card Holder with Strap
items.name_cn:
💕【New Arrival】GG Emblem Series Card Holder with Strap
The GG Emblem series reinterprets classic patterns with creative design and innovative functions, crafted as a future collectible. This beige and dark brown card holder redefines the brand's new small accessories collection, crafted from new GG monogram canvas. The multi-compartment design is practical, and the brown leather strap adds texture.
Model: 819121.
Size: 10(L) x 7(W)
Color: Beige PVC / Original Leather.
Made in Italy

items.name_cn:
💕【New Arrival】Iconic GG Supreme Canvas in the 2025 Early Autumn Collection, reinterpreting the new floral print with a blue tone. This beige and dark brown full-zip wallet features a modern floral pattern and GG logo.
Beige and dark brown GG Supreme canvas
All-over blue floral print
Cloud print fabric lining
Inside: 12 card slots, 3 bill slots, and 1 zip coin pocket
Zip closure
Model: 841150
Size: 19cm(W) x 10.5cm(H) x 2.5cm(D)
Weight: approx. 230g
Color: Beige embossed print / Original leather.
Made in Italy

items.name_en: Top Quality Replica Exclusive Real Shot 📷【Lisa Wallet】M12536 Pearl Light Blue (Embossed)
items.name_cn:
Top Quality Replica Exclusive Real Shot 📷【Lisa Wallet】M12536 Pearl Light Blue (Embossed)
This Lisa wallet is crafted from iconic Monogram Empreinte leather with a "shiny" effect, perfect for the party season. Its compact design easily slides into small bags or clutches, with a letter combination flower charm on the zipper. Inside, it features multiple pockets for coins and bills, plus four card slots.
Size: 9 x 11.5 x 1.5 cm
